short_blurb: Reliable roofing services for Covina homeowners and commercial property owners.
local_note: Covina's residential neighborhoods feature a mix of ranch homes, two-story colonials, and Spanish-style properties. Many homes here have concrete tile roofs that are aging well on top but have failing underlayment beneath — a silent leak waiting to happen. We specialize in tile lift-and-relay projects that preserve your existing tile while completely renewing the waterproof underlayment and flashings.

faqs.a: It's when we carefully remove your existing tile, replace the underlayment and any damaged flashings, then re-set and re-secure the original tile. It's the right choice when your tile is still in good shape but the underlayment beneath is failing.
